# variant-region

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Factory for pluggable chrome regions with per-app switchable variants. Collapses the config + slot + host + picker + registrations boilerplate into defineVariantRegion (core) and defineVariantRegionWeb (web).
- Web:
  - Uses:
    - `apps-core.useCurrentAppId`
    - `config_v2.ConfigV2`
    - `config_v2.useConfig`
    - `config_v2.useSetConfig`
    - `fields/dynamic-enum/config.DynamicEnum`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
    - `primitives/slot-render.renderIsolated`
    - `ui/theme-engine.ThemeEngine`
    - `ui/theme-engine.useThemeScopeId`
  - Exports (types):
    - `VariantContribution`
    - `VariantRegionWeb`
  - Exports (values): `defineVariantRegionWeb`
- Server:
  - Uses: `config_v2.ConfigV2`
  - Exports (values): `variantRegionServerContribution`
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `config_v2.defineConfig`
    - `fields/dynamic-enum/config.dynamicEnumField`
  - Exports (types):
    - `VariantRegionCore`
    - `VariantRegionFields`
  - Exports (values): `defineVariantRegion`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by:
    - `apps-core/app-rail-framing`
    - `ui/sidebar-framing`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
